name: ai-music-studio
description:
AI Music Studio — describe a vibe, get a finished, downloadable track in 30–90 seconds. Generate original lyrics, full vocal songs, or pure instrumentals through Mureka's state-of-the-art models. Bring your own lyrics or let the AI write them in any language.

What it does:
• Writes original lyrics from any theme or mood (any language, any style).
• Produces full vocal songs (vocals + music) from your lyrics or generated ones.
• Produces vocal-free instrumental tracks for background, study, or scoring.

Tools the agent uses:
• generate_lyrics — Generates a title and complete lyrics from a short description. Fast (~2s). Supports any language and section markers like [Verse]/[Chorus].
• generate_song — Produces a full song (vocals + music) from lyrics, using Mureka 9 (premium, latest) or Mureka 7.5 (cheaper/faster). Style prompt controls genre, mood, BPM, instrumentation, and vocal style.
• generate_instrumental — Produces a no-vocals track, using Mureka 6 or Mureka 5.5. Style prompt controls genre, mood, tempo, and instrumentation.

Genres & use cases:
Pop, rock, hip-hop, lo-fi, EDM, country, folk, jazz, ambient, cinematic, classical, R&B, metal — perfect for podcast intros, YouTube/TikTok backgrounds, jingles, game soundtracks, study/focus music, theme songs, demos, and creative experiments.

Output:
Every track returns a playable MP3, lossless FLAC, and uncompressed WAV link, plus duration in seconds.

prompt.description: What you want — e.g. 'upbeat 80s pop song about Tuesdays', 'lo-fi instrumental for studying', 'turn these lyrics into a country ballad: ...'

summary.description: Short description of what was produced

lyrics.description: Final lyrics if a song was generated

audio_mp3.description: Generated track (MP3, playable in any browser)

duration_seconds.description: Length of the generated track in seconds
